The dim lighting of the theater and the rows of classic red seats around us really set the scene, adding to the immersive experience.

photos.caption: Cinerama
photos.captionKii: I captured this impressive interior shot, looking up at a grand stage curtain. The curtain itself has a beautiful, vertical striped texture and is brightly illuminated from above, creating a lovely glow. Above the curtain, the ceiling features a striking, curved design with multiple layers and scattered small lights that resemble stars, giving the whole space a very elegant and somewhat magical feel. It felt like we were waiting for a performance to begin, with a palpable sense of anticipation in the air.

photos.caption: City from The Wheel
photos.captionKii: I captured this stunning view from inside the Ferris wheel at night, looking out through its intricate white metal framework. The geometry of the wheel's structure framed the vibrant city skyline below, with countless windows in the high-rise buildings twinkling like stars against the dark night. It was an incredible perspective, offering a wide vista of the urban landscape as we slowly ascended and descended.

photos.caption: An evening at the Great Seattle Wheel
photos.captionKii: I captured this vibrant nighttime shot of the iconic 'The Seattle Great Wheel' sign, brightly lit with bold text and its distinctive Ferris wheel logo. Below it, the word 'TICKETS' glowed in striking red neon, promising adventure. In the background, the actual Seattle Great Wheel itself was visible, its spokes illuminated with a beautiful purple light against the dark sky, creating a truly enchanting and lively atmosphere. It was exciting to see this landmark all lit up at night.

photos.caption: Ignite Seattle
photos.captionKii: I captured this interesting moment at an indoor gathering, where several people were gathered, facing away from me, looking intently at a large projected image. The projection itself featured an abstract logo with connected circles and lines, and it also served as a dynamic canvas for the large, distorted shadows cast by the attendees standing in front of it. I noticed one person in a bright pink sweater with a unique wavy pattern on the back, and another wearing a blue shirt with white text on the back that seemed to say 'Hit Beat'. It felt like a lively and visually engaging atmosphere at wh

photos.caption: Ray with Our Beachcombing Trash Haul
photos.captionKii: I captured this moment on the rugged, pebbly beach, with the familiar white lighthouse complex standing prominently in the distance under the overcast sky. My young companion, dressed in a bright red jacket, stands looking towards the right, while a large piece of driftwood in the foreground serves as a makeshift table. On the log, there's a bottle of lemonade, some snacks or bits and pieces, and what looks like a few unique glass or metal objects, adding a touch of whimsy to our beachside stop. It was a peaceful moment, taking a break from our coastal exploration.

photos.caption: New Dungeness Lighthouse
photos.captionKii: I captured this wide shot of the rugged coastline, looking across a foreground filled with scattered driftwood and pebbles. In the distance, the familiar white lighthouse complex, with its distinctive red-roofed main building, stood against the overcast sky, anchoring the expansive, somewhat desolate landscape. It was a moody but beautiful view of the natural elements meeting the man-made beacon.

photos.caption: Kite-flying in Rain and Fog
photos.captionKii: I captured this serene, somewhat misty scene of a young one in a bright red hooded jacket, flying a vibrant red kite. The kite soared against the overcast, hazy sky, adding a splash of color to the muted tones of the day. In the background, the distinctive white lighthouse with its red roof stood prominent, accompanied by other white buildings with green doors, all part of the charming lighthouse complex. It was a lovely, quiet moment during our coastal exploration, despite the foggy weather.

photos.caption: Boy, kelp, cargo ship
photos.captionKii: I captured this lovely moment of a young one, bundled up in a bright red hooded jacket and gloves, standing on the sandy shore. Small waves gently break on the beach, where a large pile of tangled brown kelp or seaweed lies. In the hazy distance, a cargo ship floats calmly on the water, adding to the serene and somewhat misty coastal atmosphere. It was a beautiful, if cool, day by the sea.

photos.caption: New Dungeness Lighthouse from Keepers House
photos.captionKii: I captured this serene moment from inside, looking out through an arched window as the lighthouse beam shone brightly against the twilight sky. The scene outside was a tranquil blend of the white lighthouse, its beacon cutting through the blueish dusk, and a glimpse of a nearby white building with a red roof. It felt like a peaceful evening, watching the lighthouse fulfilling its duty, a perfect end to a day of coastal exploration.

photos.caption: Clouds Over Dungeness Bay
photos.captionKii: I captured this truly dramatic moment where powerful rays of sunlight were piercing through thick, dark, and heavy clouds, illuminating the distant horizon and mountains. The sky was an incredible spectacle, creating a stark contrast with the silhouetted foreground—a calm body of water stretching out, with dark land and what appear to be a couple of small structures visible on its edge. It felt like the perfect capture of a moody coastal scene, with the sun fighting to break through, painting the landscape with light and shadow.

photos.caption: Clouds Over Dungeness Bay
photos.captionKii: I captured this impressive coastal landscape under a dramatic, cloudy sky. The clouds are particularly striking, with long, wavy layers stretching across the expanse, and a small patch of blue peeking through in one spot. In the foreground, there's a small, weathered white structure, perhaps a shed or a boathouse, and a lone bird is perched calmly on its roof. Beyond it, a calm body of water stretches towards a distant, tree-lined shore, adding depth to the scene. The dry, tall grass in the immediate foreground gives it a rustic, natural feel, perfectly capturing the moody beauty of the coast

photos.caption: Lighthouse Shadow
photos.captionKii: I captured this impressive high-angle view from the lighthouse, looking down at the grounds and the expansive coastline. The most striking element is the long, distinct shadow of the lighthouse itself, stretching across the vibrant green lawn, over the white picket fence, and onto the dry, grassy, and sandy coastal area. You can see a small white building with a red roof on the left, and part of the building I'm standing on with its own red roof and chimney in the foreground. Beyond the land, the calm, blue water of the sea stretches out, showing gentle ripples. It was a beautiful, sunny day f

photos.caption: Clouds Over Dungeness Bay
photos.captionKii: I captured this breathtaking wide shot of the expansive coastal landscape, showcasing the deep blue water stretching out under a vibrant sky filled with scattered white clouds. The sun, high in the top left, casts a brilliant lens flare, illuminating the scene. In the distance, a long strip of land extends into the water, bordered by distant mountains that fade into a soft haze. The foreground is covered in dry, golden-brown grass, hinting at the rugged beauty of the area. On the left, a small white structure stands near the water's edge, and in the bottom right corner, a hint of a red roof su

photos.caption: Dungeness Bay and Spit
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweeping panoramic view, likely from a high vantage point, overlooking a vast expanse of calm blue water that merges with the sky on the horizon. A long, narrow strip of land, covered in dry, golden-brown grass, stretches out along the coastline, curving gently into the distance. In the far background, majestic mountains rise, their peaks partially obscured by a light haze, under a beautiful blue sky dotted with soft white clouds. Below, on the land, there's a distinctive reddish-brown rectangular area that looks like a metal roof, and a winding path cuts through the grassy ter

photos.caption: Tilt Shift Lighthouse View
photos.captionKii: I captured this unique high-angle shot of one of the white buildings within the lighthouse complex, which features a prominent red roof and green trim around its windows. Right out front, an American flag flies proudly on a pole in the well-maintained green lawn. The perspective almost gives it a miniature, tilt-shift effect, and you can see the white picket fence surrounding the property, with the vast, marshy brown landscape stretching towards the water in the background, and even a small boat pulled up on the shore. It was a great way to capture the residential side of the historic site and

photos.caption: New Dungeness Light Station
photos.captionKii: I captured a wide shot of the lighthouse complex from a distance, showing the main white lighthouse with its red roof, surrounded by several other white buildings under an overcast sky. An American flag flies proudly near one of the houses, and what really caught my eye in the foreground was this expanse of rusty, textured metal grates, which provided an interesting, weathered contrast to the pristine white buildings. It gave a great sense of the overall layout of the historic site from a unique perspective.

photos.caption: Ray - Lighthouse Keeper
photos.captionKii: I took this photo of a young boy standing smiling inside the lighthouse's lantern room, right next to the massive, glowing lamp. You can see the ocean stretching out beyond the windows, giving a great sense of the height and the coastal view from up here. He's wearing a yellow lanyard, perhaps from a tour or a special visit, and seems quite happy to be exploring the historic site.

photos.caption: Ray Mugging at the Lighthouse
photos.captionKii: Here's another shot from my visit to the lighthouse, with this young boy smiling brightly in the foreground. He's on a path amidst the tall, dry grasses, and behind him, you can see the whole expanse of the white lighthouse complex with its red roof and surrounding buildings under the overcast sky. The American flag is still visible, flying near one of the buildings, and there's a tall tower off to the right. It captures a great sense of the complete setting, with the boy enjoying the coastal environment during our exploration.

photos.caption: New Dungeness Lighthouse
photos.captionKii: Here's a broader view of the beautiful white lighthouse and its accompanying buildings from the outside. The day was quite overcast, giving the whole scene a soft, diffused light, and you can see the American flag flying proudly near some picnic tables on the green grass. It was great to get this perspective of the entire structure and its serene surroundings during my visit, rounding out my exploration of the area.

photos.caption: Jim - Lighthouse Keeper
photos.captionKii: I took another selfie from high up inside the lighthouse's lantern room, looking directly at the camera with a smile. I'm wearing my black cap and striped scarf, and the distinct green metal bars of the window frame are visible behind me. Through the window, you can see the hazy, light-filled outdoor environment, which really gives a sense of the height and the unique perspective from this iconic structure. It was a great moment to capture.

photos.caption: New Dungeness Lighthouse Light
photos.captionKii: I captured a close-up of the incredible Fresnel lens inside the lighthouse's lantern room. The light from within the lens creates these mesmerizing concentric rings, glowing warmly and showing off its intricate design. Through the window bars, you can just make out the expansive, hazy outdoor landscape, likely marshy ground leading to the water, giving a sense of the vastness the lighthouse watches over. It's truly amazing to see such a crucial and beautiful piece of maritime technology up close.

I loved the dizzying perspective looking down this spiral staircase! The way the dark treads with their ribbed texture and bright yellow trim spiral around the central pole creates such a striking pattern. It really gives you a sense of the height and the winding journey up or down a lighthouse. It's a testament to the engineering that went into these structures, allowing access to the very top. I can almost feel the slight echo as I imagine descending these steps, taking in the unique internal architecture.

I was absolutely fascinated by this incredible lighthouse lens. The way the light plays through all those precisely cut glass prisms, set within the beautiful golden frame, is just mesmerizing. It's a true marvel of engineering, designed to cast a powerful beam of light across the sea. Seeing it up close like this, perhaps in a museum or inside the lighthouse itself, really gave me an appreciation for the detail and craftsmanship that goes into creating such a vital navigational aid. You can see the reflections in the glass casing, hinting at the environment it's displayed in, and it really br

photos.caption: Bald Eagle
photos.captionKii: I spotted this majestic bald eagle perched atop a dead tree stump, silhouetted against the vast, gray expanse of the water and sky. The scene was incredibly atmospheric with the overcast weather creating a soft, diffused light over the coastal landscape. It was a serene moment, capturing the wild beauty of the area as the eagle surveyed its surroundings during my outing.

photos.caption: Amy and Ray in the Light
photos.captionKii: From a distance, I captured a shot of the lighthouse's observation deck, showing two people taking in the view from up high. One person, wearing a blue jacket, stands looking out over the landscape, while another in a red hooded jacket is partially visible, leaning over the black railing. It gives a good sense of the scale and how visitors experience the outside platform of this impressive structure on what looks like an overcast day.

photos.caption: Lighthouse Keeper
photos.captionKii: I captured this black and white selfie while inside what appears to be the lantern room of the lighthouse. I'm wearing my black cap and a striped scarf, looking directly at the camera with a smile. The sturdy, grid-like metal bars of the window frame are prominent in the foreground, and through them, I can vaguely see the hazy, light outdoor view, which gives a sense of the considerable height I've climbed. It was a cool moment to be up there and snap a picture to remember the unique perspective from the top of such an iconic structure.

I captured another selfie from inside the lantern room of the lighthouse, with the distinct green metal bars of the window framing the shot. I'm smiling broadly, wearing my black cap and the striped grey and white scarf, looking directly at the camera. Through the windows, you can see the hazy outdoor conditions, giving a great sense of the height and atmosphere from this unique vantage point.

I got another perspective of the interior of this lighthouse, looking up the elegant spiral staircase. The sturdy metal handrail guides the way as the light wooden treads and darker risers curve upwards, drawing the eye towards the light filtering in from the windows above. It truly gives a sense of the height and the architectural journey within this impressive structure.

I captured this overhead view of my living room, bathed in the warm, inviting glow of the lamps. It looks so cozy and lived-in from this perspective! The patterned rug adds a nice touch of color to the wooden floors, and I love how all the furniture—my green sofa, the comfy red armchair, and even the old rocking chair—are arranged. It really feels like the perfect spot to relax on an autumn evening, especially with the soft light filtering through the lace curtains on the windows. It's nice to see my space looking so welcoming.

I captured a quiet moment of my child relaxing on the green armchair, tucked under a cozy blanket, in this warm corner of the house. The soft glow from the lamp perfectly highlights the built-in bookshelves, which are packed with all sorts of stories, and I love the charm of the vintage radio and the old globe on the wooden table. It really feels like the perfect spot for a peaceful evening, with those lace curtains on the window and even a couple of little lighthouse decorations on the shelf, adding a nice touch. It's so nice to see him so comfortable in this personal space.

I wanted to capture the cozy feel of this bedroom. The star-patterned quilt on the bed looks so inviting, with its gentle shades of blue, green, and white. I love the classic touch of the wooden vanity with the ornate mirror, and that small chair tucked underneath, it really adds character to the room. The light blue walls give it a serene atmosphere, and even with the darkness outside the windows, the room feels warm and peaceful, ready for a quiet evening. It's nice to see the brass quilt rack and fresh towels, making it feel perfectly set up for comfort.

I managed to capture this shot of the lighthouse glowing brightly in the complete darkness of the night. It's so striking how the powerful light from the beacon cuts through the black, a true guide for any ships out at sea. The structure itself is almost entirely silhouetted, making its iconic shape stand out against the ink-black sky, with just a hint of its form visible below the lantern room. It was quite a sight to see it standing there, unwavering, in the quiet of the evening.

photos.caption: Sunny
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful day! I couldn't resist snapping a photo of this magnificent sunflower, its bright yellow petals absolutely glowing in the sunshine. You can even spot a tiny bee diligently working on its dark center, adding to the perfect natural scene. The field behind it stretches out under a clear blue sky, hinting at even more greenery and perhaps other blooming plants further back. It was such a peaceful and vibrant moment in nature that I just had to capture.

photos.caption: Ghost Pumpkins
photos.captionKii: I loved seeing these unique pale pumpkins! So many of them piled up, looking almost ghostly white with hints of pale green and speckled textures. They have such interesting, slightly irregular shapes and prominent stems, making them perfect for autumn decorations. It really feels like the heart of the harvest season when you see such a beautiful bounty like this. It was great to discover these at the farm today, a wonderful addition to the vibrant sunflowers I saw earlier.

photos.caption: Lost Children/Deep Fried Butter
photos.captionKii: I had to snap a photo of these quintessential fair signs! Against a bright blue sky, I captured a white banner announcing 'LOST CHILDREN' – a familiar and somewhat amusing sight at any big event like this. Below it, I can just make out 'WM FAIR' on a red wagon, which seems to confirm we were at some kind of fair or carnival. And right next to it, the glorious black sign for 'DEEP FRIED BUTTER' with its classic melting butter graphic, perfectly sums up the indulgent and unique culinary spirit of fair food. It really captures the slightly quirky and festive atmosphere of a county fair!

photos.caption: Piglet
photos.captionKii: Oh, this little one is just too precious! I caught this adorable piglet completely lost in slumber, snuggled up on a bed of golden wood shavings. Its little pink snout and ears are so cute, and I love the distinct black patch across its back and head. It looks so peaceful and cozy, probably enjoying the warmth from above. You can just barely make out another, larger pink pig resting in the background. It's moments like these during the farm visit that are just pure joy to capture.

photos.caption: Piglet Pile!
photos.captionKii: Oh my goodness, look at these precious little things! I captured this unbelievably cute scene of a whole pile of newborn piglets, all snuggled up together on a bed of golden wood shavings or straw. There are so many of them, a mix of pure pink ones and some adorable black and white spotted ones, all peacefully sleeping or resting. You can even see the warm glow of a heat lamp in the top left, keeping them nice and cozy. It's such a heartwarming sight to see them all piled up like that, completely oblivious to the world, just enjoying their nap. I just had to capture this moment of pure, innoce

photos.caption: Ray and Dennis Bounds from KING-5 News at SPL Breakfast of Champions.
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweet moment at what looks like a formal event, with a proud-looking man posing next to a young boy. The man, with his warm smile, is slightly crouched, showing his support. The boy is dressed so smartly in a blue shirt and an argyle sweater vest, and I can just make out his name tag on his chest, which suggests he's participating in or being recognized for something special. They're both smiling brightly, and the background hints at an indoor gathering, possibly in a hotel or event space, with large windows and draped tables. It's lovely to see such a heartwarming interaction

photos.caption: View of Puget Sound from 17th Floor Russell Investments — Best view in downtown!
photos.captionKii: What an incredible panoramic view I managed to capture of the city skyline, stretching out towards the expansive bay! On the left, a cluster of modern skyscrapers reaches for the sky, while the buildings continue to dot the horizon all the way across. The water is so calm, and I can even spot a boat cruising along in the distance. Above, the sky is a dramatic canvas of wispy white clouds against a beautiful blue. This shot really captures the vibrant energy of the city combined with the serene beauty of the natural waterfront, and it's amazing to see so much detail packed into one frame.

photos.caption: Mt. Rainier with Cloud Hat
photos.captionKii: Wow, what an absolutely breathtaking view! I captured this incredible scene looking out over a vast evergreen forest, with a thick layer of mist or clouds hugging the lower mountain slopes and valleys. Towering majestically in the background is this magnificent snow-capped mountain, its peaks peeking through a patch of bright blue sky and fluffy white clouds. The sheer scale and beauty of nature here are just astounding, and I love how the dark green pine trees frame the shot, adding to the feeling of being deep within the wilderness. It's moments like these that make you feel truly connected

photos.caption: Chocolate Cocoa Tree
photos.captionKii: Wow, look at this incredible chocolate sculpture! It's designed to look just like a tree trunk, with intricate details like chocolate cacao pods clinging to its side and delicate chocolate leaves. There's even this stunning, realistic pink flower, which I think might be made of sugar, adding such a beautiful pop of color and an artistic touch. It's resting on a clean, light-colored surface, and I can see a white brick wall in the background, which makes me think it might be in a display area or a shop. On the table next to it, there are a few more chocolate pieces and a lovely wooden bowl. Thi

photos.caption: Cocoa husks
photos.captionKii: This close-up shot of cacao beans and nibs is so fascinating to see! In the bright red bowl, you can clearly distinguish the roasted and broken cacao nibs, looking ready for the next stage of chocolate making. Right next to it, there's a neat pile of whole, uncracked cacao beans, showing them in their more natural state. The light wooden surface underneath gives the whole composition such an authentic, warm feel, really highlighting the natural textures of the beans. It's incredible to see these raw ingredients up close that go into making chocolate, and it definitely adds another layer to und

photos.caption: Chocolate Bean Roaster at Theo Chocolate
photos.captionKii: What an amazing experience getting to see a massive coffee roasting machine up close! This whole setup is so industrial and impressive, with the big spherical roaster at the center, surrounded by all sorts of metal pipes and ducts, including that bright yellow one. I can only imagine the aroma of freshly roasting beans filling this place. It's fascinating to see where our coffee comes from and the complex process involved. The 'BEAN ROOM' sign in the background adds to the authentic roastery feel, and those red bins in the foreground make it feel like a busy, working environment. It’s incredib

photos.caption: Safeco Field
photos.captionKii: What an electrifying night at Safeco Field watching the Seattle Mariners! The stadium is absolutely buzzing, illuminated by the bright field lights against the dark night sky. I love being in the stands, soaking up the incredible atmosphere as everyone cheers on the team. You can clearly see the 'Seattle Safeco Field' sign on the scoreboard, and the massive screens are showing replays and crowd shots. The field looks so pristine under the lights, and it's cool to see people in the crowd, including me, waving white towels, really getting into the game. It’s moments like these, surrounded by fel

photos.caption: Sunset in Lund
photos.captionKii: What an absolutely breathtaking sunset over the harbor! The sky is ablaze with the most incredible shades of orange, red, and deep gold, creating such a dramatic backdrop. All the sailboats and yachts are silhouetted beautifully against the vibrant light, their masts standing tall as the sun dips below the horizon. I love how the calm water catches the fiery reflections, adding to the tranquil yet powerful atmosphere. There's even a gorgeous sunbeam streaking down from the setting sun, making the whole scene feel truly magical. It was such a perfect moment to just stand and soak in the natural

photos.caption: Windsor Lake — Panorama of Windsor Lake, BC
photos.captionKii: What a breathtaking panoramic view of this tranquil lake nestled among towering, tree-covered mountains! I love how the dark, calm water perfectly reflects the lush green slopes under a bright, partly cloudy sky. The dense forest extends right down to the water's edge, creating a serene and untouched natural landscape. I can even spot a hint of a wooden pathway or boardwalk along the shore on the right, suggesting a peaceful walk I might have taken. This moment truly encapsulates the stunning natural beauty I’ve been discovering around Victoria, making this trip so incredibly memorable.

photos.caption: Lund Marina — Marina at Lund, BC
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful panoramic view of this charming harbor! I love how this shot captures the entire inlet, dotted with numerous boats and yachts gently bobbing on the calm water. Along the shore, there are quaint buildings, some looking like cozy restaurants or cafes with their outdoor seating, nestled among the lush green trees. The rocky shoreline on either side, with its varied textures and seaweed, adds to the natural, rustic feel, and the clear blue sky with soft white clouds makes for a perfect day to be by the water. It’s moments like these that truly showcase the picturesque beauty of co

photos.caption: Frog — Frog at Windsor Lake
photos.captionKii: Walking around, I was so delighted to stumble upon this little guy! It's a gorgeous green and brown frog, perfectly camouflaged against the damp ground and scattered leaves, twigs, and pine needles. Its eyes are so striking and seem to be looking right at me, almost as if posing for the camera. This low-angle, close-up shot really captures the intricate details of its skin and the serene way it's just sitting there, enjoying its natural habitat. It’s moments like these, connecting with the local wildlife, that make exploring Victoria’s natural beauty so special and memorable.

photos.caption: Totem
photos.captionKii: I love seeing the vibrant cultural art that populates British Columbia! This shot captures a beautiful, intricately carved wooden totem pole, standing tall against the stunning backdrop of the ocean and a clear blue sky. The totem pole features a powerful face with striking blue paint around the eyes and mouth, drawing attention to its expressive features and traditional artistry. In the background, the calm, deep blue water stretches out, meeting a distant landmass under an expansive, bright blue sky. It's moments like these that truly bring the history and spirit of Victoria to life, making

photos.caption: Glamping
photos.captionKii: This shot really captures the perfect vibe of relaxing outdoors. My hand is holding a refreshing martini glass, complete with what looks like a cherry or olive at the bottom, perfectly complementing the golden hour light filtering through the trees. My feet are propped up, sporting some sturdy hiking boots, signifying that I'm probably unwinding after some adventure or just enjoying the tranquility of nature. In the background, a blue camping chair is set up, ready for more lounging, and I can just make out a picnic table, hinting at a meal or snacks nearby. The dappled sunlight gives everythi

photos.caption: Ferry Dock
photos.captionKii: It’s moments like these that truly highlight the beauty of coastal travel. This shot perfectly captures a serene view of deep blue waters, gently reflecting the clear, vast blue sky above, all framed by the distant, forested mountains. In the foreground, a prominent rusty orange pipe or beam cuts horizontally across the lower part of the frame, drawing the eye towards a floating white dock structure nestled against the shore. The overall scene feels so peaceful and fresh, instantly bringing back memories of the stunning landscapes we passed by on the BC Ferries journey.

photos.caption: Queen of Coquitlam Ferry
photos.captionKii: It’s always a reminder of a great trip when I see the safety equipment like this on a ferry. This shot captures a vibrant orange lifebuoy, boldly emblazoned with "QUEEN OF COQUITLAM" and "VICTORIA," clearly signaling our vessel and destination or route. Neatly coiled yellow rope is secured in its center, ready for any emergency, and above it, a green emergency sign adds to the sense of preparedness. This lifebuoy, mounted securely on the ship's wall, immediately brings back memories of the fresh sea air and the scenic journey on the BC Ferries.

photos.caption: Il y a beaucoup de Carcassonne
photos.captionKii: As a board game enthusiast, it’s always a treat to see such a dedicated display, or maybe even my own growing collection, of one of my absolute favorites: Carcassonne. This shot captures a beautiful array of different versions and expansions, all lined up neatly on wooden shelves. I can spot 'Carcassonne the Discovery,' 'Inn & Cathedrals,' 'The Castle,' 'Wheel of Fortune,' and 'The Tower,' each box art telling its own little story of medieval landscapes and adventures. It’s hard not to feel a surge of excitement and nostalgia seeing all these familiar titles; it really highlights the depth and

photos.caption: I Can't Believe I'm Doing This
photos.captionKii: There's something uniquely peaceful about hitting balls at a driving range under the night sky. This shot perfectly captures the expansive green of the range, illuminated by the overhead lights, making the various target greens and sand bunkers really stand out. You can even see the faint lines of golf balls scattered across the grass, ready for the next swing. In the distance, the outlines of buildings and the night sky create a calm backdrop. It was a really relaxing way to unwind and get some practice in after a long day.

photos.caption: Boy Reading
photos.captionKii: It's always wonderful to see him so absorbed in a book. This shot perfectly captures a young boy with light brown hair, head resting on his hand, completely lost in the story. His focus is so intense, and the soft light gently illuminates the pages of the open book he's reading. A simple glass jar sits beside him, adding to the quiet, peaceful atmosphere. It’s these calm, domestic moments of him deeply engrossed in reading that I truly cherish, reflecting a serene evening at home.

photos.caption: Jimi
photos.captionKii: Continuing my exploration of Seattle, I had to seek out the iconic statue of Jimi Hendrix. It's truly a powerful piece, capturing him in what feels like a moment of deep musical immersion or contemplation, with his eyes closed and that unmistakable expression. The bronze gives it such a raw, textured feel, emphasizing every detail of his hair, headband, and mustache. Seeing this tribute to such a legendary musician right here in his hometown was a really special part of my visit, connecting me with the city's rich cultural heritage.

photos.caption: Cloudy Needle
photos.captionKii: What a fantastic day to see the iconic Space Needle! The sky was absolutely dotted with these beautiful, fluffy white clouds, creating such an interesting pattern above the structure. You can just see the top of the Needle peeking out above some lush green trees, with its distinctive saucer-like observation deck and spire. It was truly a classic Seattle moment, capturing one of the city's most recognizable landmarks against a perfect summer sky.

photos.caption: Cash
photos.captionKii: During my continued exploration, I stumbled upon this absolutely stunning antique cash register. It's a real masterpiece of design, crafted from what looks like aged brass or bronze, covered in such intricate, embossed floral and geometric patterns. 'NATIONAL' is clearly visible on the front, and 'CASH' displays proudly in the window at the top. It felt like stepping back in time, and given the blurry bookshelves in the background, I think I found this gem in a charming old bookstore, which was a lovely unexpected discovery.

photos.caption: Saints II
photos.captionKii: Continuing my exploration of New York City, I was completely captivated by the intricate artistry adorning the exterior of this grand cathedral. The facade is a breathtaking display of ancient craftsmanship, featuring numerous stone statues, each meticulously carved and standing within its own niche. These figures, likely depicting saints or historical figures, convey a profound sense of history and devotion, especially as the sunlight dramatically highlights their detailed robes and expressions, casting deep shadows that emphasize their three-dimensional form. It's truly astounding to witness

photos.caption: Saints
photos.captionKii: Continuing my visit to the magnificent cathedral during my New York City exploration, I was completely struck by these incredibly detailed religious statues. There were two figures, appearing to be saints or bishops, carved with such precision, their robes and facial expressions conveying a sense of solemnity. Between them, the stone carving was just as intricate, with beautiful floral patterns and architectural elements. The soft lighting in the cathedral really brought out the texture and depth of the artwork, making it feel ancient and incredibly profound. It was another moment that truly h

photos.caption: Boy in Pew
photos.captionKii: Today, while still marveling at the grand interior of the cathedral during my New York City exploration, I noticed this young boy sitting quietly on one of the long wooden benches. He was completely absorbed, looking at what seemed to be a small electronic device, perhaps playing a game or watching something. The intricate carvings on the pews and the beautiful rose window in the distance provided a striking contrast to his modern preoccupation, but it was a quiet, memorable moment in such an awe-inspiring space.

photos.caption: Cathedral

The soft light filtering in highlights the intricate architectural details and the beautiful lines of the columns. photos.caption: Seinfeld's Restaurant
photos.captionKii: Today, while continuing my walk through the city, I couldn't help but capture this classic New York street scene. There was a gold SUV parked neatly along the curb, and a woman casually walking by on the sidewalk, adding to the bustling urban atmosphere. The sturdy brickwork of the adjacent buildings and the clear crosswalk markings really cemented the feeling of being right in the heart of a vibrant neighborhood.

photos.caption: Freedom Tower

It's truly a sight to behold, witnessing such a monumental building taking shape, reaching higher and higher into the urban landscape. It makes you feel the pulse of the city's constant evolution and resilience.

photos.caption: Marx/Labor
photos.captionKii: What a find! Today, while wandering through what felt like a truly unique bookstore or library in the city, I stumbled upon this intriguing setup. The wooden bookshelves are packed with titles, and right there on the concrete floor, in bold stenciled green letters, are the words 'MARX' and 'LABOR'. It instantly caught my eye, especially with a book that appeared to be 'Karl Marx' visible on the shelf directly above its painted name. There's even a distinctive crack running across the floor, adding to the character of the place. It's moments like these, discovering themed sections or quirky det

photos.caption: Small Brain Cavity
photos.captionKii: Today, I found myself captivated by this magnificent dinosaur skeleton in what must have been a natural history museum. The sheer scale of these ancient creatures is just incredible. I was particularly drawn to the informational display on the glass, detailing the work of paleontologist O.C. Marsh in the 1890s, and the fascinating insights into the animal's small brain cavity and the expansion in its spinal cord. It's moments like these, learning about Earth's distant past, that make city explorations so enriching and full of unexpected discoveries.

photos.caption: Brooklyn Bridge

The sun is shining brightly, reflecting off the clear water, and the lush tropical surroundings with the rock waterfall, palm trees, and thatched-roof structures truly set the scene. It was wonderful to see him so excited and happy to dive into the water activities, embracing every bit of our time in paradise.

photos.caption: The pool where Ray snorkeled in circles for hours
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this beautiful, sunny moment during our tropical getaway, with my son standing confidently by the edge of the resort pool. He's wearing his blue rashguard and dark shorts, looking ready for another day of fun in the water. The clear blue sky, lush palm trees, and the sparkling ocean in the background, complete with a distant boat, really highlight the serene and perfect vacation setting. It was such a lovely day to be by the water, and I enjoyed watching him embrace every part of our time in paradise.

photos.caption: Last fruit plate
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this delightful breakfast moment with my son during our tropical getaway. He's looking down at a beautiful spread of fresh tropical fruits on our outdoor wooden table, all set with neat white dishes and a green plaid napkin. He's wearing that vibrant blue Hawaiian shirt that perfectly matched the setting. We had such a variety of fruits, including juicy papaya with lime, bananas, berries, what looks like rambutan, and mango, along with some yogurt or cream. It was wonderful to enjoy these sunny, healthy meals outdoors during our trip.

photos.caption: Amy, Jim, and Ray on our Last Day at Kona
photos.captionKii: I remember taking this cheerful family photo during our tropical getaway. My wife, my son, and another family member are all smiling brightly, standing together in front of a beautifully carved wooden statue adorned with leis. We're surrounded by lush green grass and towering palm trees, with the resort's charming thatched-roof bungalows visible in the background under the clear, sunny sky. It was such a lovely moment to capture everyone looking so happy and relaxed in paradise.

photos.caption: On the way to dinner

Even though it was dark, the warm glow from the tiki torch next to the lush tropical plants really created a beautiful, ambient mood. My son is wearing a plaid shirt, and his partner is in a pretty coral-colored dress. It was wonderful to capture them enjoying the serene nights at the resort.

photos.caption: Last sunset
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this absolutely breathtaking sunset during our tropical getaway. The sky was a vibrant canvas of deep purples, oranges, and fiery reds as the sun dipped below the horizon, casting a magnificent glow over the calm ocean. The silhouettes of the tall palm trees on the dark beach, possibly volcanic sand, really framed the scene beautifully. There are a few faint figures walking along the shore, enjoying the serene moment as well. It was a truly magical end to another day in paradise, one of those peaceful moments I love to remember.

I can see some of our clothes hanging to dry on the rustic wooden railing, and a fresh green coconut sitting on the wooden deck beside him, perfectly completing the serene tropical vibe. It was lovely to see him enjoying these quiet, reflective moments.

It was a lovely, peaceful scene, with a couple of boats bobbing gently in the water and a floating platform further out. These serene

It was an unforgettable experience to witness such a powerful natural phenomenon at night, a stark reminder of the living geology of this amazing place.

I can even see my hand, or someone's hand I was with, holding a white plastic bag, offering him something or just being nearby. Another child is partly visible in the background, also holding a cup. It was a perfect scene of refreshment and simple enjoyment during our time out exploring, adding to the relaxed, local vibe of our trip.

photos.caption: Hilo Farmers Market -- Fresh coconut water vendor
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this candid moment of a local man skillfully preparing fresh coconuts. He's crouching down, intently using a large knife or machete to husk a green coconut on a wooden board, with the discarded outer layers accumulating around him. There are numerous green coconuts piled up nearby, some still whole and others already opened, hinting at the refreshing drinks we'd been enjoying. This whole scene, with its simple setup near a wall and a blue folding chair in the background, really gave me a sense of the authentic local life and the abundance of fresh produce during our tropic

photos.caption: Wrestling on the banyan
photos.captionKii: I remember this incredible moment exploring a lush, root-filled landscape with my son. We were surrounded by these massive trees, possibly banyan or similar, with their incredible aerial roots creating a dense, almost magical jungle. I'm holding his hand as he carefully navigated the rocky, root-covered terrain, and I recall feeling a sense of adventure and wonder at the natural beauty around us. The sunlight filtered through the canopy, highlighting the textures of the roots and leaves, making it a truly immersive experience.

photos.caption: Giant redwoods don't measure up to banyans
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this amazing sight of two children standing at the base of an enormous banyan tree, its massive trunk and countless aerial roots creating a natural wonder. The sheer scale of the tree really comes through, making the children look tiny in comparison as they explore its impressive structure. The ground around us was a tangle of roots and earth, adding to the wild, ancient feel of the place. I can also just make out a yellow school bus in the background, a reminder that even in this natural marvel, we weren't too far from civilization, probably enjoying a nature stop during

photos.caption: Always a tree hugger
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this young boy, his light hair catching the dappled sunlight, playfully interacting with the massive roots of a banyan tree. He's got his arms wrapped around one of the large, gnarled trunks, looking off to the side with a sweet, subtle smile. We were deep in this lush, root-filled jungle, and moments like these, seeing the kids exploring and connecting with nature, really added to the magic of our tropical getaway. The way the light filtered through the canopy, highlighting his hair and the texture of the tree, made it feel like a truly special, adventurous moment.

photos.caption: Rainbow falls
photos.captionKii: I remember taking this photo during our tropical getaway, capturing a beautiful moment at a stunning waterfall. In the foreground, a woman, possibly my companion, is standing with a young boy, who is wearing a red sun hat. They are both smiling, and she's wearing a backpack, suggesting we were on an excursion. Behind them, a powerful waterfall cascades down into a pool, and I was thrilled to capture the faint but distinct rainbow visible in its mist. The lush green foliage and clear sky with fluffy clouds really highlight the beauty of the natural surroundings, making it a memorable stop on ou

photos.caption: Rainbow Falls - indeed!
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this breathtaking view of a powerful waterfall, with its clear waters cascading down into a dark pool below. What made it truly magical was the vibrant rainbow perfectly arcing through the mist at the base of the falls, a stunning natural phenomenon. The entire scene was framed by incredibly lush and dense tropical foliage, with tall trees dominating the background against a clear sky. It was such a stunning display of nature's beauty and power, a moment of pure wonder during our tropical getaway.

photos.caption: The waterfall on the grounds of our Inn
photos.captionKii: I remember this moment during our tropical getaway, standing with a young boy, likely my son, in front of a powerful waterfall. We're both geared up in our rain jackets – I'm in a dark blue one and he's in a bright orange one – ready for the mist and spray from the cascading water. The lush, green tropical foliage surrounds us, creating a beautiful and immersive natural backdrop. Capturing us together in such an incredible setting, with the sound of the waterfall all around, was a really special part of our adventure.

photos.caption: View of Hilo from our balcony
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this expansive view of a tropical landscape, looking out towards the coast under a cloudy sky. In the foreground, dense, dark green trees and palms dominate, suggesting a rich, natural environment. Beyond the immediate foliage, I can see a strip of land that appears to be an airport runway, stretching out towards the ocean, with hints of light breaking through the clouds on the horizon. It felt like a moment of quiet observation, taking in the vastness of the scenery and the blend of nature with human infrastructure during our tropical trip.

photos.caption: Ray looking over the balcony of our inn in Hilo
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this serene view of a distinctive building, perhaps a residence, with its beautiful dark-tiled, multi-tiered roof and light purplish-gray walls. I noticed a child on the upper balcony, wearing a striped shirt, looking out over the railing, seemingly enjoying the fresh air or observing something in the distance. The architecture had a calm, almost traditional feel to it, and I could just make out a sign near the entrance that read 'Residence,' hinting at the peaceful nature of the place.

photos.caption: Ray's Rock Climbing Excursion

The wall was covered with a variety of colorful handholds and footholds, and a safety rope was clearly visible, ensuring their climb was secure. It was fascinating to watch them focus and move, with the hands of a belayer just visible at the bottom, ready to assist. It was a bustling street scene, with other onlookers visible in the background, all enjoying the vibrant cultural celebration.

It was a really heartwarming interaction to witness and capture amidst all the festivities.

photos.caption: Lunar New Year 2010

Each dancer held a decorated stick, some with orange tassels, and their coordinated movements were captivating against the backdrop of spectators gathered on the street. It was wonderful to see such a variety of cultural performances contributing to the lively atmosphere.

It’s a beautiful, classic-looking home with beige walls, a dark grey tiled roof, and crisp white windows, all centered around a striking red front door with a small stoop. To the side, you can see hints of other Lego creations, like a bright red garage and another colorful building, all contributing to the miniature world I enjoy building and arranging.

I remember taking a step back to admire my growing Lego collection, all neatly displayed and organized on these shelves. I remember the satisfaction of completing this magnificent Lego modular building! It's such a detailed piece, resembling a classic corner European building with its grey and green facade, intricate windows, and a charming blue and white striped awning over what looks like a small shop. The bay window section on the right is particularly striking. I loved placing all the tiny elements like the lamppost and fire hydrant, bringing this miniature world to life. It’s always a joy to see a complex project like this come together.

The setting was so serene yet wild, with the clear water reflecting the sky and surrounding rocks and dry branches. It was amazing to see such a majestic animal so at peace in its natural environment, adding another unforgettable wildlife encounter to our adventure.

Seeing such a wild animal in its natural habitat was truly a highlight of our trip, adding to the sense of adventure and wonder in the mountains.

You can see the large brick oven, glowing with fire, where all those delicious pizzas were cooked. The chefs were busy at work; one person was preparing dough or ingredients at the counter, and another was carefully slicing a freshly baked pizza right off the tray. There were stacks of clean plates ready for service. The whole place had such an authentic feel, and it was great to capture the energy behind the scenes of our amazing pizza dinner.

photos.caption: Pizza at Delancey

It looks like we were enjoying a meal at a restaurant, with other plates, a refreshing dark drink, and a glass of water on the warm wooden table. It was a lovely evening sharing good food and company, the kind of simple pleasure I always love to capture.

We were in our living room with the orange wall in the background and the dining area visible, and you can spot some colorful gift bags and wrapping paper on the floor, making it clear it was a special occasion, like a birthday celebration. It was lovely to capture his joy with his new outfit.

photos.caption: Grizzly Bear

The sunlight filtered through the trees, casting beautiful shadows on its thick, shaggy fur, making its rich brown tones really stand out. It looked so calm and majestic in its natural habitat, simply basking in the warmth of the day. It was incredible to observe such a powerful creature up close, completely at peace in the quiet woods.

photos.caption: Bull Elk
photos.captionKii: I remember spotting this magnificent elk resting peacefully amidst the dense forest. Its impressive antlers stood out against the green foliage, and its powerful build was evident even as it lay relaxed on the sloped ground. The dappled sunlight filtering through the tall trees created a beautiful, serene atmosphere around it. It was a truly special moment to witness such a majestic creature in its natural habitat, just taking a break in the quiet woods. I was careful not to disturb it, just appreciating its calm presence.

photos.caption: Bighorn Sheep
photos.captionKii: I remember spotting this peaceful herd of wild sheep, possibly bighorn sheep, grazing and resting in a wide-open, grassy field. There were quite a few of them, some standing attentively, others casually munching on the green grass, and a few even lying down, enjoying the tranquility of their natural habitat. It was such a serene moment to observe these magnificent animals, just going about their day in the calm outdoors.

photos.caption: Foggy Flower Fields with Waterfall — Paradise, Mt. Rainier, WA

The air was thick with fog, giving the scene an ethereal quality, and through the haze, I could just make out a small waterfall or stream gently tumbling over rocks in the background. It was truly a perfect day to be out there, taking in the serene and breathtaking natural landscape while playing a round.

It was a fascinating piece of history nestled in the landscape.

The bright sunlight illuminated the scene, making it feel very grand and patriotic. It was a beautiful moment to capture the flag in such a scenic, natural setting.

It really felt like a hub for exploring the region.

I noticed the old-fashioned gas pumps and a bicycle parked nearby, giving the place a real small-town, welcoming feel. It was a lovely, quaint spot to pause and take it all in.

photos.caption: On the Road to Redstone

It was quite an impressive sight, seeing how engineering blended with or cut through nature, making for a striking moment on my journey.

The green grass of the field and the dirt of the batter's box really bring out the classic baseball atmosphere. It was a perfect day for a game.

photos.caption: Mother's Day 2009 — Ray and I made necklaces for Amy. Here she is with mine.

Her glasses were perched on her nose, adding to her focused gaze. The soft, dim lighting of the room and the dark green armchair she was sitting in created a cozy, relaxed atmosphere, and I think I caught a glimpse of a fireplace in the background.

photos.caption: Garden Box Project 2009 — Amy spreads the dirt

You can see the brick wall of the house in the background, surrounded by green bushes, making a nice, private spot for our new garden. It was satisfying to get everything prepped for planting!

It was such a powerful perspective, truly capturing the grandeur and tranquility of being deep within nature.

I remember seeing a green jacket sleeve in the background, which, along with the blurry legs and general outdoor setting, suggested we were out in nature, perhaps hiking or just exploring the local wildlife. It was such a delicate creature, and it was fascinating to get such a close look.

The intense focus on their face and hands really conveyed their dedication to the craft, and it was fascinating to watch the detailed work come to life under their pen.

photos.caption: Vincent Yee, Charicaturist — Vincent Yee draws a charicature of Ray.
photos.captionKii: I captured this heartwarming scene at an event, where a talented caricature artist was busy drawing. A young boy in a colorful striped hoodie is patiently posing for his portrait, looking intently at the artist, while the artist, wearing glasses and a patterned shirt, focuses on his sketch. In the background, a little girl with some face paint peeks out, watching the process with interest. The setup with the drawing board and lights suggests a professional but welcoming atmosphere, perfect for a community gathering or family-friendly event.

photos.caption: Bob Abrams, WB artist — Former Warner Bros. cartoon artist Bob Abrams gives an animation demonstration drawing Daffy Duck
photos.captionKii: I took another shot of the talented older artist, who I'd seen earlier, completely immersed in their drawing at the community event. With their white hair and glasses, they were again meticulously working on the light table, using a pen to sketch out intricate details on what looked like a character or figure. The way they focused so intently on their craft, even amidst the activity of the event, was truly captivating to watch.

photos.caption: Light Art: Untitled by Ray
photos.captionKii: I captured yet another intricate light painting, further exploring the fascinating possibilities of long-exposure photography. This one features a complex web of vibrant purple light trails, twisting and looping into an abstract, almost chaotic yet beautiful design against the complete darkness. The lines crisscross and overlap, creating a sense of depth and movement, as if multiple glowing threads were dancing in the air. Each new experiment reveals new patterns and techniques, and this one really showcases the dynamic energy of light.

photos.caption: Light Art: Moon and Stars (by Jim)
photos.captionKii: I tried a different approach with my light painting, moving beyond abstract swirls to create specific shapes. Here, I managed to draw a glowing purple crescent moon accompanied by four stars, and a small, intricate swirl off to the side, all illuminated against the complete darkness. It's really cool how a simple light source and a long exposure can transform an empty space into a celestial scene like this, exploring the artistic potential of light.

photos.caption: Light Art: Untitled by Ray
photos.captionKii: I captured this really cool light painting, a mesmerizing swirl of bright purple light against a completely dark background. The glowing lines twist and turn, creating an abstract, almost calligraphic pattern. It looks like it was made with a light source moved during a long exposure photograph, or perhaps it's part of an exhibit demonstrating light and optics. The deep purple color is quite striking, making the energy of the light really pop in the darkness.

photos.caption: Light Art: Jim's First Attempt
photos.captionKii: I continued my light painting experiments, capturing another intriguing abstract pattern with bright purple and pink light trails. This composition features more intertwined loops and graceful curves, appearing almost like an infinity symbol, glowing vibrantly against the deep darkness. If you look closely, you can faintly make out what seems to be my hand or arm in the background, suggesting my direct involvement in moving the light source to create this effect. There are also subtle hints of a wooden ruler or frame on the left and some faded patterns on a background surface, adding just a to

photos.caption: Vacuum Tubes
photos.captionKii: I was absolutely fascinated by this display of vintage vacuum tubes when I came across it during my outing. The sheer variety of shapes and sizes, all neatly arranged on their individual wooden bases within the multi-tiered glass case, was incredible to see. You can really appreciate the history of electronics here, with all these intricate glass bulbs that were once at the heart of radios, televisions, and early computers. It felt like I was stepping back in time, surrounded by these technological relics, and I probably spent a good while just admiring the craftsmanship and imagining their pu

photos.caption: Vacuum Tubes
photos.captionKii: I was really drawn to the intricate details of these larger vacuum tubes, getting a much closer look than in some of the other displays. You can really see the delicate internal filaments and grids through the clear glass envelopes, encased in their polished metallic bases. The way they reflect on the glass shelf creates a beautiful, almost endless array of these historical components. It's amazing to think about the technology they represented, and seeing them up close like this, almost perfectly preserved, truly highlights their industrial design and importance in early electronics.

photos.caption: Tesla Coil

Below, the clear acrylic base panels perfectly reveal the complex internal wiring, the prominent transformers, and other components that power this incredible device. The copper primary coil is also very visible at the base of the secondary. I captured a bit of someone's hand near the setup, likely a demonstrator, which gives a sense of scale and suggests an active presentation was

The brick wall in the background and the glimpse of someone's plaid trousers suggest I might have been at a workshop or a demonstration, rather than a formal exhibit. It's such a satisfying feeling to have everything in its place, making it so much easier to find exactly what I need and dive into a new creation, especially after all the holiday building. They seemed curious about the different sections for recycling and compost. We were clearly in some kind of modern public space, with large windows and railings reflecting the surroundings, and it was nice to just capture them exploring and learning about the world around them.

Its wings were such a striking combination of light blue-green and earthy brown patterns, and it was clinging perfectly still to the underside of this vibrant green leaf. I love how you can see the delicate veins on the leaf and even a tiny water droplet glistening at the tip. The light was just right, filtering in and highlighting all the intricate details. It felt like such a peaceful moment, watching nature's beauty up close, possibly in a butterfly garden or conservatory.

The concentration on both their faces was just so sweet, and it perfectly captured the cozy, joyful atmosphere of spending the holiday indoors, playing with new toys. The soft, blurry glow of what looks like Christmas lights in the background just adds to that festive feeling.

The greenish tint probably came from how my camera captured the low light or some nearby streetlights reflecting off the snow, but it really emphasizes the quiet, almost ethereal feel of the scene. You can just make out the faint glow of streetlights and perhaps a car or two in the distance, capturing the calm solitude of a winter night.

It was definitely a cozy, festive day indoors, surrounded by holiday cheer.

photos.caption: LED Card for Ray — Homemade glowing card I made for Ray

It says 'MERRY CHRISTMAS RAY' in colorful, handwritten letters, with little turquoise snowflakes drawn around the top. It feels so personal and thoughtful. I remember capturing this because the glowing snowflake was really unique, and it perfectly captured the festive spirit of the season. It's moments like these, receiving or making something special, that really make the holidays feel warm.

photos.caption: Ray at Whittier Playground

He's got that classic kid smile with his tongue playfully sticking out, clearly enjoying himself. In the background, you can see the distinctive blue and red climbing pyramid, which always stood out. The wood chips on the ground and the trees, mostly bare, hinted at the season, but his energy certainly brightened the day.

photos.caption: Ray at Playground — Riding the giant sea serpent

In the background, you can spot the familiar blue and red climbing structure and the wood chips covering the ground. The trees are mostly bare, but his cheerful spirit definitely brightened up the late autumn day.

photos.caption: Ray at Playground — Climbing in the rope structure

In the background, I could see other protestors and another pink sign showing stick figures representing different types of families, further emphasizing the message of inclusion. The sun was shining on us as we marched, with houses and trees lining the street, creating a strong sense of community and purpose.

It was a powerful visual reminder of what we were all fighting for.

Even though it was a serious cause, there was a sense of community and determination in everyone walking alongside me.
